initial_candidates.sql:
WITH bond_element_pairs AS (
    SELECT 
        a1.element AS element1,
        a2.element AS element2,
        b.bond_id
    FROM connected c
    JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
    JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
    JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
),
commonest_pair AS (
    SELECT 
        element1,
        element2,
        COUNT(*) AS pair_count
    FROM bond_element_pairs
    GROUP BY element1, element2
    ORDER BY pair_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
total_bonds AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
    FROM bond
)
SELECT 
    CAST(cb.pair_count AS REAL) * 100 / tb.total AS percentage
FROM commonest_pair cb, total_bonds tb;

WITH element_pairs AS (
    SELECT 
        a1.element AS element1,
        a2.element AS element2,
        COUNT(b.bond_id) AS bond_count
    FROM connected c
    JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
    JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
    JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
    GROUP BY a1.element, a2.element
),
most_common_pair AS (
    SELECT 
        element1,
        element2,
        bond_count
    FROM element_pairs
    ORDER BY bond_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
total_bonds AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count
    FROM bond
)
SELECT 
    (mc.bond_count * 100.0 / tb.total_count) AS percentage
FROM most_common_pair mc, total_bonds tb;

WITH bond_element_pairs AS (
    SELECT 
        a1.element AS element1, 
        a2.element AS element2, 
        b.bond_id
    FROM connected c
    JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
    JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
    JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
),
pair_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        element1, 
        element2, 
        COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM bond_element_pairs
    GROUP BY element1, element2
),
most_common_pair AS (
    SELECT 
        element1, 
        element2, 
        cnt
    FROM pair_counts
    ORDER BY cnt DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
total_bonds AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
    FROM bond
)
SELECT 
    (mc.cnt * 100.0 / tb.total) AS percentage
FROM most_common_pair mc, total_bonds tb;

WITH bond_elements AS (
    SELECT 
        a1.element AS element1,
        a2.element AS element2,
        b.bond_id
    FROM connected c
    JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
    JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
    JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
),
element_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        element1,
        element2,
        COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM bond_elements
    GROUP BY element1, element2
),
most_common AS (
    SELECT 
        element1,
        element2,
        cnt
    FROM element_counts
    ORDER BY cnt DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
total_bonds AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
    FROM bond
)
SELECT 
    CAST(mc.cnt AS REAL) * 100 / tb.total AS percentage
FROM most_common mc, total_bonds tb;

WITH bond_elements AS (
    SELECT 
        a1.element AS element1,
        a2.element AS element2,
        b.bond_id
    FROM connected c
    JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
    JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
    JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
),
bond_element_pairs AS (
    SELECT 
        element1,
        element2,
        COUNT(*) AS pair_count
    FROM bond_elements
    GROUP BY element1, element2
),
most_common_pair AS (
    SELECT 
        element1,
        element2,
        pair_count
    FROM bond_element_pairs
    ORDER BY pair_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
total_bonds AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count
    FROM bond
)
SELECT 
    CAST(mcp.pair_count AS REAL) * 100 / tb.total_count AS percentage
FROM most_common_pair mcp
CROSS JOIN total_bonds tb;
